source_note: GLB geometry is generated reproducibly by script. Blender imports each object as an individual asset.

style.reference: chunky low-poly forms with denser pixel details and preserved green/pale/deep palette

usage.#3FA943: status lights, labels, book spines, drawer fronts, green fabric, rug swirls, and accents
usage.#E8F8E4: pale plastic highlights, shelf boards, desktop, stitches, rug print, and disc center
usage.#0C1725: deep shell, recesses, ports, and shadows

notes: Generated as one GLB mesh/node for clean Blender import; source geometry is reproducible from tools/create_psx_dvr_assets.py.
Generated as one GLB mesh/node for clean Blender import; source geometry is reproducible from tools/create_psx_dvr_assets.py.
Large-bezel box CRT television with dominant convex black glass screen and bottom button row.
Large room-scale bookshelf prop, sized above the CRT while staying in the shared PSX palette.
Large desk prop, wider and deeper than the CRT television for room-scale placement.
Player-sittable lazy sofa generated from a UV-sphere body with procedural sculpt deformations.
Round floor rug inspired by game disc and vinyl silhouettes, with original X WHEEL markings.
Reusable taped wall poster asset for Emi room poster clusters.
Reusable loose draft-paper sheet with pixel line marks.
Desk table lamp with pixel-era shade, pull chain, and green glow accent.
Reusable short pencil prop sized for desk clutter.
Reusable small eraser with wrapper bands.
Small potted plant for shelf-top decoration.
Wheeled lounge chair sized for a five-head chibi player character.
Reusable fallen book asset for room floor clutter.
Reusable translucent CD case for room floor clutter.
Complete low-poly room scene for Emi, composed from prior assets plus original room clutter.
